title: MOSSEL BAY FIRES: Firefighting efforts challenged by strong winds
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Footage of heavy smoke was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Footage of heavy smoke was taken from Hartenbos Heuwels, where smoke is visible in a vegetation area between Sonskynvallei and Hartenbos Heuwels.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Footage of heavy smoke was taken from Hartenbos Heuwels, where smoke is visible in a vegetation area between Sonskynvallei and Hartenbos Heuwels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality says that, as a precautionary measure, residents of these two neighbourhoods are advised to close all doors and windows.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality says that, as a precautionary measure, residents of these two neighbourhoods are advised to close all doors and windows."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strong and shifting winds, with speeds of up to 35 km/h expected, are making conditions difficult for firefighting efforts.","html":"Strong and shifting winds, with speeds of up to 35 km/h expected, are making conditions difficult for firefighting efforts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Aerial firefighting operations have commenced, and fire crews are fully deployed in the area.","html":"Aerial firefighting operations have commenced, and fire crews are fully deployed in the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser journalists are on the scene. Follow our newsteam for the latest information.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser journalists are on the scene. Follow our newsteam for the latest information."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
